info.title: NEST Boilerplate Api Documentation
info.description: Boilerplate of NEST project Api Documentation to test and review APIs

resendApiKey.description: Resend API key. Required when provider is RESEND

brevoApiKey.description: Brevo API key. Required when provider is BREVO

host.description: SMTP host. Required when provider is SMTP

port.description: SMTP port. Required when provider is SMTP

username.description: SMTP username. Required when provider is SMTP

password.description: SMTP password. Required when provider is SMTP

fromEmail.description: Sender email address used for outgoing emails

testEmail.description: Email address used for provider validation before saving configuration
